command_log.command:
set -euo pipefail && PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/0.3.1" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/state.sh" && source "${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib/workflow.sh" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/example.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WORKFLOW_FILE") && workflow_validate_unique_ids "$WORKFLOW" && state_init ".wheel/state.json" "$WORKFLOW" "$WORKFLOW_FILE" && STEP_COUNT=$(printf '%s
' "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length') && WF_NAME=$(printf '%s
' "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.name') && FIRST_STEP_ID=$(printf '%s
' "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].id') && FIRST_STEP_TYPE=$(printf '%s
' "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].type') && echo "Workflow '$WF_NAME' started ($STEP_COUNT steps)." && echo "First step: $FIRST_STEP_ID ($FIRST_STEP_TYPE)" && echo "" && echo "Hooks are now active. Run /wheel-status to check progress, /wheel-stop to deactivate."
echo 'Checking environment...' && which jq && which bash

mkdir -p reports && cat > reports/env-report.md << 'EOF'
# Environment Check Report

## Detected Tools

| Tool | Path |
|------|------|
| jq   | /usr/bin/jq |
| bash | /opt/homebrew/bin/bash |

## Summary

Environment check passed. Both required tools (jq and bash) are installed and available on the system PATH. Bash is installed via Homebrew at /opt/homebrew/bin/bash.
EOF
echo "Report created"
test -f reports/env-report.md && grep -q . reports/env-report.md && echo 'SUCCESS' || echo 'FAILURE'

git add plugin-wheel/lib/dispatch.sh plugin-wheel/package.json plugin-wheel/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(wheel): chain branch step into target step dispatch

dispatch_branch was setting the cursor to the target step but not
dispatching it, causing the workflow to stall until the next hook
trigger. Now chains into dispatch_step for the target, matching
how dispatch_command already chains into subsequent steps.

Bumps wheel plugin to 0.3.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push origin main
mkdir -p .wheel/history/success && cp .wheel/state.json .wheel/history/success/example-workflow.json && echo "State archived to success"

cat > reports/workflow-result.md << 'EOF'
# Workflow Result: SUCCESS

## Summary

The example-workflow completed successfully. All steps passed.

## Step Results

| Step | Status | Details |
|------|--------|---------|
| check-env | Passed | Found jq at /usr/bin/jq and bash at /opt/homebrew/bin/bash |
| generate-report | Passed | Created reports/env-report.md with tool summary |
| verify-report | Passed | Output: SUCCESS — report exists and is non-empty |
| check-result | Passed | Branch condition matched SUCCESS, routed to cleanup-success |
| cleanup-success | Passed | Archived state and wrote this report |
EOF
echo "Report written"
